sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11054" key="a)cio/poinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀξιό-ποινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11054.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exacting due punishment,</tr_> of Athena at Sparta, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:15:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.15.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
